expectedEvidence.description: Asset plan evidence records placeholders, local refs, manifest refs, and license/source notes.

boundary: Use placeholder assets or known local refs only with license/source notes; GDD-derived output remains untrusted until Rust/local validation and review-gated apply; no asset generation, no remote fetch, no autonomous unrestricted game creation; remote fetch enabled for asset lookup; browser read-only or draft-only surfaces only.
